issues: Design prototype assumes 120K Deal Hunter MAU but does not validate this number against actual segment data
Savings streak mechanic may create perverse incentives — users ordering low-value items just to maintain streaks
strengths: Creative approach to making Pro value tangible through daily savings visibility
Competitive audit is thorough and identifies clear differentiation opportunities
revisions_required: Cross-reference Deal Hunter MAU with Data Agent's segment analysis before finalizing prototype scope
Add a finding addressing the perverse incentive risk and propose mitigation (e.g., minimum order value for streak)
